summary: Comprehensive testing of new 'Domein' sub-tab in Instellingen for custom domain management. All 10 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working. Fixed bug: /auth/me endpoint was missing custom_domain and custom_domain_landing fields.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Domain settings feature fully tested. All features working: 3 sub-tabs (Instellingen, Notificaties, Domein), Custom Domein card with input and Opslaan button, Landingspagina selector (Kiosk/Login), DNS Configuratie card with CNAME info and copy buttons, 5-step DNS instructions, Verifiëren button for DNS check, Uw Custom URL card with https URL and copy button.

backend.result: PASS - Returns status not_found for fake domain

frontend.result: PASS - Shows domain input and Opslaan button
PASS - Kiosk Betaalpagina and Login Pagina options
PASS - Shows CNAME, Naam/Host, Waarde/Doel with copy buttons
PASS - All 5 steps visible in Dutch
PASS - Triggers DNS check, shows status indicator

frontend.test: Domein sub-tab - Uw Custom URL card
frontend.result: PASS - Shows https URL with copy button after domain saved

bug_fixed.description: /auth/me endpoint was missing custom_domain and custom_domain_landing fields
bug_fixed.fix: Added custom_domain and custom_domain_landing to the /auth/me response

mocked_apis.Mope Payment Gateway: MOCKED - Uses mock_ prefix for API key
